summary: Iteration 39 Testing - Three Feature Fixes VERIFIED. All 3 features working correctly: 1) Login page operator checkbox REMOVED, 2) Pod member assignment accepts 'employee' role users, 3) Geography page shows expandable country-region parent-child view with Cameroon having 10 regions.

issues: Pre-existing: Notifications API console error (AxiosError mixed content) - not related to current features

feature_1_login_operator_checkbox_remove.checkbox_visible: PASS - Element completely removed from Login.jsx
feature_1_login_operator_checkbox_remove.checkboxes_on_login_page: PASS - 0 checkboxes found on login form (was 1 before fix)
feature_1_login_operator_checkbox_remove.login_form_elements: PASS - Email/Password/Submit all present and functional
feature_1_login_operator_checkbox_remove.code_review: PASS - Login.jsx confirmed FileText import removed, isOperator state removed, checkbox JSX removed

feature_2_pod_member_employee_role.add_employee_role_user_to_pod: PASS - User with role='employee' added to pod successfully
feature_2_pod_member_employee_role.pods_route_accepts_employee_role: PASS - Backend pods.py lines 270-271 now include 'employee' in role check
feature_2_pod_member_employee_role.frontend_pod_modal: PASS - Add Member modal shows 6 available employees including employee-role users

feature_3_geography_expandable_view.countries_list: PASS - 7 countries displayed in unified list
feature_3_geography_expandable_view.expandable_click: PASS - Clicking Cameroon expands to show nested regions
feature_3_geography_expandable_view.regions_nested: PASS - Adamawa, Centre, East, Far North, Littoral, North visible inside Cameroon
feature_3_geography_expandable_view.add_region_button: PASS - 'Add Region' button available inside country expansion
feature_3_geography_expandable_view.no_separate_tabs: PASS - Old separate 'Countries' and 'Regions' tabs replaced with unified expandable view

critical_code_review_comments: Login.jsx: isOperator checkbox and FileText import correctly removed (per requirements)
pods.py lines 270-271: Role check now includes 'employee' alongside 'admin' and 'super_admin'
GeographyManagement.jsx: Complete rewrite with expandable country cards, nested regions, and 'Add Region' button inside expansion
PodManagement.jsx line 101: Employee role users now included in combined employee list for pod assignment
seed_data_creation: Created test employees with user accounts and employee role for pod assignment testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 verified three fixes: 1) Login page no longer has 'I am logging in as a service operator' checkbox - completely removed from JSX and state, 2) Pod Management now accepts users with role='employee' for pod membership - backend pods.py updated to include 'employee' in role validation, 3) Geography page now uses expandable parent-child view for countries-regions (like hotels-rooms) - click country to reveal nested regions with 'Add Region' button inside. All features working correctly.
